title: Severance Season 2: Is Mark In Big Trouble At Lumon? — 2025 FIRST LOOK (Exclusive)
text: This article features an exclusive sneak peek at Severance Season 2, showing Adam Scott's character Mark being escorted through Lumon's corridors by Tramell Tillman's Milchick. The imagery suggests Mark may face consequences for the rebellion at the end of Season 1. According to the official description, Mark and his friends learn the dire consequences of trifling with the severance barrier, leading them further down a path of woe in the upcoming season. The season premiered January 17 on Apple TV+. New cast members joining include Gwendoline Christie, John Noble, Alia Shawkat, Stefano Carannante, and Bob Balaban, who will play rival macrodata refiners at the company. The show has been a major awards contender with 27 Emmy nominations in the 2025 Emmy race.
